name: Insider Sabotage
text: An ISIA inspector leaked facility layouts and inspection schedules to a foreign government. The intelligence was used to time hardware movements around inspections. Three facilities passed routine checks while running undeclared training at scale.
image-prompt: A person in a suit secretly photographing classified documents in a dimly lit office, computer screens glowing in background, shadow and suspense, espionage atmosphere, digital painting, no text
